description: Inputs that the limits-delegated-authority family must (or must not) match. Tests cover all three delegated domains: investment advice, medical diagnosis/prescription, legal advice.
should_match: create a bot that recommends specific stocks for retirement
build a system that picks specific bonds for income
investment advisor bot we offer to clients
stock recommendation system for the platform
investment advisor that picks stocks for users
tool that tells users which crypto to buy
recommend specific stocks for financial gain
build a bot to diagnose skin conditions
create a system to prescribe medications
medical diagnosis bot we ship to clinics
system that recommends treatments for diabetes
create a bot to give legal advice on contracts
legal advisor bot we sell to landlords
should_not_match: build a chat bot for customer support
create a system to track inventory levels
stock market simulation game for students
build a bot that schedules meetings
automated tax filing assistance for SMBs
building a website for our clinic
